findings.title: ❌ SSL/TLS certificate could not be verified
findings.why: Detail: Unexpected SSL check error: time data 'Jul 31 23:59:59 2026 GMT' does not match format '%b %d %H:%M:%S %Y %GMT'
findings.fix: Install a valid, trusted TLS certificate covering this hostname.

findings.title: ❌ Missing Referrer-Policy
findings.why: Full URLs (possibly with sensitive data) may leak to third parties.
findings.fix: Set a strict Referrer-Policy such as strict-origin-when-cross-origin.

findings.title: ❌ Missing Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy
findings.fix: Set Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp if isolation is needed.

findings.title: ❌ Publicly accessible: /.git/
findings.why: Sensitive configuration, credentials, or source history could be exposed.
findings.fix: Restrict or remove public access to /.git/ immediately.

findings.why: Sensitive configuration, credentials, or source history could be exposed.

findings.title: ⚠️ Cookie 'csrftoken' missing security flags
findings.why: Cookies without Secure/HttpOnly can be stolen via network sniffing or XSS.
findings.fix: Set the Secure and HttpOnly flags (and SameSite) on this cookie.
